top_signals.title: How Pension Funds Invest in Crypto
top_signals.summary: Pension funds are among the world’s largest institutional investors, and in recent years they have started investing in crypto. Pension funds typically invest in crypto through regulated vehicles such as spot bitcoin ETFs, digital asset investment funds, and crypto-related public companies. Because pension funds manage retirement assets and have strict fiduciary responsibilities, they typically use […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
